subcodes.first_line: The denizens of all worlds and the company of them that are nigh unto God bear witness that there is none other God but Him, and that this servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و قد یشهد اهل العالین و ملا المقربین بانه لا اله الا هو و ان هذا العبد
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @transcendence; unknowability of God
